title: Fix placeholder description in github-contributions quest
author: MarcosFRG
pr_body_excerpt: The `solve_github_issue` quest has a placeholder description `'A demi description'` that will appear in the public quest catalog. Replacing with a real description.

gist.headline: Quest text leveled up
gist.blurb: Swapped out a placeholder description in the GitHub contributions quest for the real deal. No more 'demi descriptions' in the catalog!
gist.summary: Replaced a placeholder 'demi description' for the solve_github_issue quest with its actual text in the public quest catalog.
gist.impact: Users browsing the quest catalog will now see an accurate description for the GitHub issue quest instead of placeholder text.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a quest-giver or adventurer, updating a wooden quest board. RPG/fantasy cozy vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny adventurer's hat, pinning a new parchment scroll to a wooden quest board. The board is surrounded by lime green (#ecf874) glowing mushrooms and pastel flowers. Soft warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
